hero.thesis: Become a top-performing live seller on Whatnot by hosting live auctions for toys and trading cards, generating $400–$1k per stream.
hero.marketSize: The live commerce market is projected to exceed $423 billion by 2028, driven by interactive buying experiences.
hero.payingEvidence: Whatnot's top sellers report monthly revenues over $10k from consistent streaming and engaging audiences.

ninetyDay.title: Kickstart Your Brand

actions.action: Create a compelling seller profile on Whatnot focused on toys/cards.
Research top toy/card trends on Whatnot and Reddit's /r/ActionFigures.
Prepare your first live auction script and practice it.

ninetyDay.metric: Profile set up, first script ready.

actions.action: Join and engage with two Discord communities: ToyCollectorHub and CardTraderNet.
Source initial inventory from eBay and local thrift stores with a $300 budget.
Schedule your first live stream on Whatnot for next week.

ninetyDay.title: First Live Auction and Feedback Loop

actions.action: Host your first live auction on Whatnot; focus on engagement and sales techniques.
Analyze stream performance using Whatnot analytics tools.
Engage with viewers who participated in the stream for feedback.

ninetyDay.metric: Complete first stream, feedback from at least 5 participants.

ninetyDay.title: Optimize and Expand Inventory

actions.action: Analyze feedback and adjust auction strategy.
Increase inventory by sourcing 10 more items based on feedback and trends.
Schedule next two live streams.

ninetyDay.metric: Inventory increased by 10 items, two upcoming streams scheduled.

ninetyDay.title: Streamline Operations

actions.action: Create a checklist for pre-stream setup and execution.
Automate post-sale follow-up using ConvertKit.
Perform a mock live stream to test new processes.

ninetyDay.metric: Pre-stream checklist and follow-up automation in place.

actions.action: Incorporate interactive elements like giveaways and polls in streams.
Engage with your audience on Whatnot and Discord between streams.
Analyze engagement data from recent streams.
Design a simple brand logo using Canva.
Update all social media profiles with consistent branding.
Host a brand-focused stream highlighting your unique selling points.

ninetyDay.title: Monetize Beyond Sales

actions.action: Experiment with offering exclusive memberships or early access deals.
Setup a tiered pricing model for exclusive items.
Promote memberships during streams and on social media.

ninetyDay.metric: Membership plan and tiered pricing model established.

ninetyDay.title: Data-Driven Growth

actions.action: Analyze sales data to identify bestsellers and slow movers.
Adjust inventory sourcing based on data insights.
Host a sales event focusing on bestsellers.

ninetyDay.metric: Optimized inventory based on sales data.

ninetyDay.title: Expanding Reach

actions.action: Collaborate with another Whatnot seller for a joint stream.
Launch a referral program to encourage viewer growth.
Analyze growth metrics from collaboration and referral efforts.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased reach through collaboration and referrals.

ninetyDay.title: Reinforcing Relationships

actions.action: Send thank you notes to repeat buyers using ConvertKit.
Host a Q&A session to deepen viewer relationships.
Collect testimonials from satisfied customers for social proof.

ninetyDay.metric: Enhanced customer relationships and social proof.

ninetyDay.title: Establishing Authority

actions.action: Write a guest post for a niche blog about your Whatnot selling journey.
Host an advanced strategies stream for aspiring sellers.
Compile a year-end report on your progress and insights.

ninetyDay.metric: Authority established in the niche through content and engagement.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Automate post-sale follow-ups and customer engagement.
toolStack.pricing: Free for up to 300 subscribers, then $29/month.

toolStack.name: Canva
toolStack.why: Design branding materials like logos and stream overlays.

toolStack.name: Discord
toolStack.why: Engage with collector communities for networking and insights.

toolStack.name: Reddit
toolStack.why: Research trends and engage with niche communities.

toolStack.name: eBay
toolStack.why: Source inventory of toys and cards for live auctions.

firstTenCustomers.script: Hi [Name], I noticed you're a big fan of [Niche] collectibles! I'm hosting live auctions on Whatnot, featuring exclusive toys and cards. I think you'd find some great additions for your collection. Join us at [link] this [Day and Time]!
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial message, follow-up after 3 days, final reminder a day before the stream.

pricing.starter: $5 per auction entry fee for budget items.
pricing.growth: $20 for premium card/figure access, includes entry to all auctions.
pricing.premium: $50 for exclusive membership with early access, special discounts.
pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices as demand increases and when streams consistently sell out.

failureModes: Inventory Mismanagement: Failing to maintain a balanced stock.
Audience Neglect: Not engaging with viewers leads to drop-offs.
Poor Branding: Inconsistent branding confuses potential buyers.
Tech Issues: Streaming software problems disrupt auctions.
Lack of Promotion: Inadequate marketing results in low attendance.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to set up your LLC for $500, ensuring legal protection.
setup.payments: Integrate Whatnot's payment system for seamless transactions.
setup.contracts: Use Lovable to draft simple sales agreements for high-value items.
setup.insurance: Consider a basic business liability insurance for $300/year to cover operations.

scaling: When scaling from a solo operation to a small team, start by hiring a part-time assistant to help with inventory management and customer engagement. Use tools like Notion to keep track of inventory and tasks. As sales grow, consider hiring a co-host for streams to offer a dynamic, dual-host experience, improving engagement. Expand your sourcing network by partnering with suppliers for exclusive deals, using Apollo for outreach and relationship management. Optimize your tech setup with n8n for workflow automation, ensuring seamless operations across larger volumes.
